zh.lifeSummary: 當Gräfin Agnes von Bayern於1276年出生時，她的父親Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein47歲，母親Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg23歲。她於1290年與Heinrich von Hessen結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年享年69歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 費爾斯騰費爾德布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gräfin Agnes von Bayern于1276年出生时，她的父亲Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein47岁，母亲Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg23岁。她于1290年与Heinrich von Hessen结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年享年69岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 費爾斯騰費爾德布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German (and possibly also Dutch)   Bayer   or   Beyers  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Byers  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Gräfin Agnes von Bayern was born in 1276, her father, Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein, was 47 and her mother, Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, was 23. She married Heinrich von Hessen in 1290. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1345, at the age of 69, and was buried in Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gräfin Agnes von Bayern est née en 1276, son père, Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich von Hessen en 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1345, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen
de.lifeSummary: Als Gräfin Agnes von Bayern 1276 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein 47 und ihre Mutter Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg 23. Sie hat 1290 Heinrich von Hessen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1345 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Agnes von Bayern è nata il nel 1276, sua padre, Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich von Hessen nel 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1345, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Gräfin Agnes von Bayern(이)가 1276년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1290년 Heinrich von Hessen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 프u르스펠드브럭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Agnes von Bayern nasceu em 1276, seu pai, Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich von Hessen em 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1345, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gräfin Agnes von Bayern родилась в 1276 г., её отцу по имени Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich von Hessen в 1290 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1345 г. в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис фuрстенфелдбрукк, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gräfin Agnes von Bayern nació en 1276, su papá, Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Heinrich von Hessen en 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1345, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Alemania.
